query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.openId, u.createdAt, COUNT(t.id) as trackCount FROM users u LEFT JOIN tracks t ON t.userId = u.id WHERE u.email = 'lesanr@protonmail.com' GROUP BY u.id, u.email, u.openId, u.createdAt;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.root --database frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c --execute SELECT u.id, u.email, u.openId, u.createdAt, COUNT(t.id) as trackCount FROM users u LEFT JOIN tracks t ON t.userId = u.id WHERE u.email = 'lesanr@protonmail.com' GROUP BY u.id, u.email, u.openId, u.createdAt;
